settings.title: Boost your AI career with a recognized credential.

settings.editor: An AI certification proves your skills, enhances your resume, and increases your job opportunities. Whether you're looking to advance in your current role or break into the AI industry, earning a recognized certificate from Aicademy can help you stand out.

settings.title: Choose the right AI credential for your career.

settings.editor: Select the certification that aligns with your career goals and showcase your AI skills with confidence!
Earned by completing any Aicademy course. This certificate demonstrates your commitment to learning AI and mastering key concepts.
Designed for those seeking industry recognition. This certification requires passing an assessment or completing a final project.
Focused on specific AI fields such as Machine Learning, Deep Learning, AI for Business, and AI Ethics. Helps highlight your specialization.

settings.title: Follow these steps to get a recognized AI credential.

settings.editor: Getting certified with Aicademy is easy! Simply enroll in a course, complete the lessons, pass the final assessment, and receive your certificate.
